title: Cursorify
description: Adds interactive cursor to earlier versions
body:
[![join my tg channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dda5aef60f5a12da1753f577f55952cabe61bd9.gif)](https://t.me/fenny0I3)
### Essentially, this is a backport of the interactive cursor that appeared in newer versions of the game to earlier ones
This improves the quality of interaction with the game and in my opinion is an important part of the game  
The mod has no dependencies
